title: Guess the Song Card Game Misheard Music Game 500 Cards Hilarious Party Game for Adults, Kids, Family, Friends, and Group Game Nights
features: Product Overview: Guess the Song Card Game delivers endless fun with 500 cards, 1 hourglass, and 1 instruction booklet. Players take turns giving deliberately misheard descriptions of songs or artists while teammates guess the correct answer.

Size and Material: Misheard Music Game includes 500 durable cards and an 8.6cm hourglass, crafted from high-quality, eco-friendly materials. The cards withstand repeated play, while the hourglass ensures fair, timed rounds. Compact and portable, this game is easy to store and transport, allowing setup at home, office events, or travel.

Features: Missheard Music Game uses a unique misheard lyric mechanic that challenges players to describe songs creatively while teammates guess under a 30-second timer. Its team-based structure encourages engagement, laughter, and friendly competition.

Usage and Applications: Misheard Game is simple to play: divide 2–15 players into teams, shuffle the 500 cards, and place the hourglass in view. Draw a card, read the hint, and give a misheard description for teammates to guess before time runs out.

Suitable For: Misheard Lyrics Game is ideal for music lovers, friends, families, and adults. Designed as a music games for adults set, it combines portability, fun, and replayability. Whether at home, office, or social gatherings, this complete game encourages teamwork, creativity, and interaction, making it a perfect addition to any game night.
description: Product description Fun and Engaging Misheard Music Gameplay The Guess the Song Card Game is a hilarious and interactive game for 2–15 players, perfect for family gatherings, parties, or game nights. In the preparation stage, players are divided into 2 or more teams. The 500 cards are shuffled and laid out on the table, and the 8.6cm hourglass is placed in a visible spot to time each round. This setup ensures quick and easy game preparation so everyone can start having fun immediately. Exciting Turn-Based Rounds During each round, every team takes turns selecting one player as the “describer.” The describer draws a card and flips the hourglass to start the countdown. They then read the correct hint on the card, such as the band or song name, and give a deliberately misheard description to their teammates. The team must guess the correct song or artist before the sand runs out. Each correct guess earns one point, making the game fast-paced, competitive, and full of laughter. Winning the Game After multiple rounds, the team with the highest total score wins, or the first team to reach an agreed number of points, such as 10, is declared the winner. This misheard music game encourages creativity, teamwork, and social interaction, providing endless fun for adults, kids, friends, and family. With 500 unique cards and a portable hourglass, it offers unlimited replayability and a memorable experience for every game night. Safety Warning no
